Bash(node -e "import\('#models/lab'\).then\(async m => { const labs = await m.default.query\(\).select\('name','building'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(labs.map\(l => \({name:l.name, building:l.building}\)\), null, 2\)\); process.exit\(0\) }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\) }\)")
Bash(node -e "const {default: db} = await import\('@adonisjs/lucid/services/db'\); const rows = await db.from\('labs'\).select\('name','building'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([\(l['name'], l.get\('building','MISSING'\)\) for l in data]\)")

PowerShell($procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($procs\) { foreach \($p in $procs\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Killed PIDs: $procs" } else { Write-Host "Nothing on 3333" })

PowerShell($pid3333 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -ne 0 } | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($pid3333\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid3333 -Force }; Write-Output "done")
